title: Refined Client
body:
Refined Client is a Minecraft modpack that keeps the core gameplay completely untouched while enhancing performance, visuals, and usability for a smoother, more polished experience.
This is achieved through fabric mods such as 
- Distant Horizons,
- Sodium,
- Sodium Extra
- Iris (+ Shaders),
- e4mc,
- Lithium
- Entity Culling
- Ferrite Core
- ETF & EMF
- Continuity
- Mod Menu
- and more.

On top of that, it comes with 
- Fresh Animations
- Redstone Tweaks
- Complementary - Reimagined
